title: Code Review
summary: Review a change for correctness, regressions, security risk, and missing tests.
task_template: Review this change before merge: {task}. Inspect scope: {scope}. Prioritize correctness bugs, regressions, security risk, and missing tests.
context: Expected outcome: findings ordered by severity, evidence with file references, test gaps, and merge/no-merge recommendation.
outcome: A structured pre-merge review with actionable findings.
next_steps: Save reviewer outputs into the generated `*.output.md` files.
Merge results, then fix Critical and Important findings before merge.
